name: Wealthfolio Simplefin Bank Sync
description: Sync transaction data from SimpleFin Bridge to Wealthfolio
author: Franklin Shen (a fork from Mark Rickert's original code)

permissions.purpose: Add Bank Sync navigation item to the sidebar
Read existing accounts to match SimpleFin accounts, and create new Wealthfolio accounts during setup
Read existing transactions for duplicate detection and import new transactions from SimpleFin
Read account balances to help identify and match accounts during setup
Securely store the SimpleFin access URL in Wealthfolio's encrypted keyring
